title: Test Edge 3 (Folder Fan-Out)
cap_description: Transform folder of node1 files to list of node4 items
documentation:
## Purpose

Internal test cap. Exercises fan-out behavior by reading a folder of node1 text files and producing a list of node4 items, each optionally transformed by a text argument.

## Inputs

- Paths to one or more node1 text files.
- An optional transform text applied to each item.

## Outputs

A list of node4 text items, one per input file.

## Notes

- Not for production use. Used only in capfab test scenarios to verify fan-out routing.

args.arg_description: Paths to the input text files in folder
Text to add to each file during fan-out
